preamble.title: cip113/whitelist-send-receive-multiadmin
preamble.description: CIP113 Sub Standard for whitelist-based send/receive with multi-admin hierarchy

cardano/address/Credential.title: Credential
cardano/address/Credential.description:
A general structure for representing an on-chain `Credential`.

 Credentials are always one of two kinds: a direct public/private key
 pair, or a script (native or Plutus).

cardano/transaction/OutputReference.title: OutputReference
cardano/transaction/OutputReference.description:
An `OutputReference` is a unique reference to an output on-chain. The `output_index`
 corresponds to the position in the output list of the transaction (identified by its id)
 that produced that output

types/ManagerAuthProof.title: ManagerAuthProof
types/ManagerAuthProof.description:
Redeemer for the manager_auth withdrawal validator.
 Proves that one of the tx signers IS present in the manager linked list.

fields.title: node_idx
fields.description: Index into tx.reference_inputs pointing at the manager node

types/ManagerListRedeemer.title: ManagerListRedeemer
types/ManagerListRedeemer.description: Redeemer for the manager-list minting policy.

anyOf.title: ManagerListInit
anyOf.description: Create the origin node (one-shot, consumes seed UTxO)

anyOf.title: ManagerListInsert
anyOf.description: Insert a manager credential (requires manager_signatures withdrawal)

anyOf.title: ManagerListRemove
anyOf.description: Remove a manager credential (requires manager_signatures withdrawal)

types/ManagerSignaturesMintRedeemer.title: ManagerSignaturesMintRedeemer
types/ManagerSignaturesMintRedeemer.description: Redeemer for the ManagerSignatures minting policy (one-shot init).

types/MembershipProof.title: MembershipProof
types/MembershipProof.description:
Proof that a stake credential IS present in the whitelist.
 node_idx indexes into tx.reference_inputs.

types/TransferRedeemer.title: TransferRedeemer
types/TransferRedeemer.description:
Redeemer for whitelist_transfer_logic.
 Both senders (inputs) AND receivers (outputs) must be whitelisted.

fields.title: sender_proofs
fields.description: One proof per sender witness (stake credential of each sending address)

fields.title: receiver_proofs
fields.description: One proof per receiver witness (stake credential of each receiving address)

types/WhitelistRedeemer.title: WhitelistRedeemer
types/WhitelistRedeemer.description: Redeemer for the whitelist minting policy.

anyOf.title: WhitelistInit
anyOf.description: Create the origin node (one-shot, consumes seed UTxO)
